_note: Aligns existing playbook heuristics against the current governance decision.

alignedHeuristics.heuristicText: When recovery_deficit appears in consecutive cycles, lower the RPE ceiling first before reducing volume.
alignedHeuristics.relevanceNote: Candidate policy lowers RPE ceiling — consistent with this heuristic.

alignedHeuristics.heuristicText: Constraint tightening is most effective when applied to the decisive variable of the most recent failure mode.
alignedHeuristics.relevanceNote: session_rpe was the decisive variable in week-2 degradation. Candidate policy tightens session_rpe constraint.

conflictingHeuristics.heuristicText: Avoid simultaneous tightening of both RPE ceiling and load ceiling — address one variable at a time.
conflictingHeuristics.relevanceNote: Candidate policy tightens both session_rpe (8.0 → 7.5) and weekly_load ceiling (90% → 85%). This heuristic cautions against simultaneous adjustment.

crosswalkSummaryLines: 2 supporting heuristics aligned with the promote decision.
1 cautioning heuristic identified: simultaneous dual-variable tightening.
Governor should weigh the cautioning heuristic before confirming a promote decision.
